name: ecommerce-rest-api
description: Root orchestration for the ecommerce microservices

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,product,order -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix services/api-gateway run dev" "npm --prefix services/auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/product-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/order-service run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,auth,product,order -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix services/api-gateway start" "npm --prefix services/auth-service start" "npm --prefix services/product-service start" "npm --prefix services/order-service start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix services/api-gateway install && npm --prefix services/auth-service install && npm --prefix services/product-service install && npm --prefix services/order-service install
